description:
bl-2148 implemented the propose -> push -> detect-non-FF -> fetch -> resolve_conflict -> retry loop inline in the claim path. Extract that loop into a reusable Negotiation<P: Protocol> primitive parameterized over the wire protocol.

## Goals

- Same observable behavior for git-remote claim sync. This is a refactor, not a feature.
- The primitive is the artifact future participants instantiate.
- The git-remote Protocol implementation is the canonical reference and must remain the production code path post-refactor (no parallel old/new branches).

## Shape (to be settled by bl-26de SPEC, sketched here)

- Protocol trait: propose, detect_conflict, fetch_remote_view, retry budget.
- resolve_conflict() generalizes from Task<->Task to Task<->RemoteView via a projection supplied by the protocol.
- Failure policy is a parameter, not a hardcode: required (Err on exhaustion), best-effort (Ok(Skipped)), gating (Ok(Staged)).

## Tests

The existing claim-side sync tests must continue to pass unchanged. Add primitive-level tests that exercise the loop directly with a synthetic Protocol impl: happy path, conflict + merge + retry success, conflict + merge + retry exhaustion, unreachable remote.
title: Extract lifecycle-sync negotiation primitive
